zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland於大約1280年出生在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾登諾塔時，他的父親William de Keith Marischal of Scotland46歲，母親Barbara De Seaton46歲。他於1305年7月之前與Isabella Synton在蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾希頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1346年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1346年10月17日在英國達勒姆內維爾也斯 克羅斯享年67歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland于大约1280年出生在英国苏格兰金加迪爾登諾塔时，他的父亲William de Keith Marischal of Scotland46岁，母亲Barbara De Seaton46岁。他于1305年7月之前与Isabella Synton在苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾希頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1346年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1346年10月17日在英国達勒姆內維爾也斯 克羅斯享年67岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: Americanized form of German   Keith  .
English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
Americanized form of German   Keith  .
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

variants.name: Edoardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland was born about 1280, in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William de Keith Marischal of Scotland, was 46 and his mother, Barbara De Seaton, was 46. He married Isabella Synton before July 1305, in Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1346. He died about 17 October 1346, in Neville's Cross, Durham, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland est né environ 1280, à Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Keith Marischal of Scotland, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Barbara De Seaton, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Synton avant juillet 1305, à Synton, Selkirkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. Il est décédé environ 17 octobre 1346, à Neville's Cross, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland um 1280 in Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Keith Marischal of Scotland 46 und seine Mutter Barbara De Seaton 46. Er hat vor Juli 1305 in Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland Isabella Synton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 17. Oktober 1346 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Neville's Cross, Durham, England und wurde in Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland è nato il circa 1280 nel Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Keith Marischal of Scotland, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Barbara De Seaton, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Synton prima del luglio 1305, nel Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. Morì circa 17 ottobre 1346, nel Neville's Cross, Durham, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotlandが約1280年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアダノッタルで生まれた時，父William de Keith Marischal of Scotlandは46歳，母Barbara De Seatonは46歳であった。1305年7月以前にスコットランドセルキルクシュアイアシントンでIsabella Syntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1346年10月17日にイギリスダルハムネヴィレ'ス クロスで67歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 던타르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Keith Marischal of Scotland(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Barbara De Seaton(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1305년 7월 이전 스컷랜드 셀커크실르 시턴에서 Isabella Synton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1346년 10월 17일 영국 뒤람 네비레'스 크로스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Keith Marischal of Scotland, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Barbara De Seaton, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Synton antes julho de 1305, em Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 17 de outubro de 1346, em Neville's Cross, Durham, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland родился около 1280 г. в местности дунноттар, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Keith Marischal of Scotland было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Barbara De Seaton, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Synton перед июля 1305 г. в местности синтон, селкиркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 17 октября 1346 г. в местности невилле'с кросс, дурам, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности дурам, Англия.

sm.about 1280–about 17 October 1346: e tusa o le 1280–e tusa o le 17 Oketopa 1346

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward de Keith Marischal of Scotland nació aproximadamente 1280, en Dunnottar, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Keith Marischal of Scotland, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Barbara De Seaton, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Isabella Synton antes de julio de 1305, en Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346. Murió aproximadamente 17 de octubre de 1346, en Neville's Cross, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Durham, Inglaterra.
